misc: Has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades.
biography: Mikko, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is a seasoned competitor known for his strategic play and unwavering focus. Representing Lakeside Golf Vammala, Mikko brings a wealth of experience to the greens, having participated in the tournament on eleven occasions.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have remained just out of reach, Mikko's consistent performance and dedication to the sport are commendable. His presence on the course is always anticipated, and his fellow competitors acknowledge him as a formidable opponent.

Off the course, Mikko is known for his unique perspective on life, which some attribute to his personal milestone of planting his seeds in four different women across four different decades. Whether this has influenced his game remains a topic of friendly debate among his peers.

Although Mikko is not currently slated to compete in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts know that last-minute changes are always a possibility. His fans remain hopeful for a future appearance, eager to witness his continued pursuit of excellence.
